title: All The Client Optimisations
description: A lot of client Optimisation and QoL mods For friends with potato PC's as well as RTX Cards
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/efb5198e1950e1affe278a52ace8d750e59b4c20.png)
This modpack aims to create an enjoyable Minecraft experience for all different kinds of hardware,
while supporting virtually every visual optimisation I could find. With a few quality of life tweaks such as:
[Here 'n' There](https://modrinth.com/mod/herenthere) and [Simple Voice chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) for easier communication. ATCO also comes with a custom version
of Vanilla Tweaks, as well as custom [loading screen](https://modrinth.com/mod/drippy-loading-screen) and [menus](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancymenu).

**Performance vs Quality**
As of version 1.0 everything is set to performance mode. You can change this of course by going into the settings.
One thing that I disabled that you might not find easily is Particle rain, which if you want to use it has to be enabled via mod options.
One last thing: if you can afford it in the current RAM economy (written December 2025) I would advise giving ATCO 6Gb.
Have Fun
